  "findings": [
    "Free conductor length at outlet/junction box is less than 6 inches",
    "Violation of minimum conductor length requirements for splicing or device connections"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-pull conductors to ensure at least 6 inches of free conductor is available measured from the point in the box where it emerges from its raceway or cable sheath",
    "Alternatively, splice extension conductors if permitted and space/fill calculations allow"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 300.14 requires at least 6 inches of free conductor, measured from the point in the box where it emerges from its raceway or cable sheath, to be left at each outlet, junction, and switch point for splices or the connection of luminaires or devices. The observed condition of less than 6 inches of free conductor is a direct code violation.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 300.14"
  ]
}
